name: Her Shoes
short_description: En is a sexy and beautiful high heel sales consultant, the player will play her in the game for female guests to take off shoes, massage feet, wear shoes and other work.
detailed_description:
En is a sexy and beautiful high heel sales consultant, the player will play her in the game for female guests to take off shoes, massage feet, wear shoes and other work.

· This is a selective role-playing game.
· The player has to make choices based on the storyline.
Different choices develop into different storylines and endings.
· Beautiful 3D female character modeling.
· Beautiful and varied camera techniques.
· Rich and full of surprises.
